C1_execution_model.description: Verify the execution model identity and eligibility

C1-02.name: Model Currently Promoted
C1-02.check: model_id in PROMOTED_MODELS (static list, updated each sprint)
C1-02.rejection_reason: Model is not in the current promoted models registry

C1-03.name: Model Eligible in Current Market State
C1-03.rejection_reason: Model was not marked eligible by ADE on this bar

C1-04.name: Model Selected by ADE
C1-04.rejection_reason: Model ID in trade does not match ADE-selected model

C1-05.name: Edge Score Above Activation Threshold
C1-05.rejection_reason: Edge score below activation threshold of 60

C2_market_state.description: Verify the market state has not materially changed since ADE evaluation

C2-01.name: Current Bar Unchanged
C2-01.rejection_reason: Bar is not a live real-time bar — possible TradingView replay or restart
C2-01.note: This is the most important Pine guard. barstate.isrealtime prevents historical alerts.

C2-02.name: Session Still Valid
C2-02.check: current_session == signal_session (session has not changed since signal generation)
C2-02.rejection_reason: Session changed between signal generation and TVL verification

C2-03.name: Regime Unchanged
C2-03.check: abs(current_adx - signal_adx) <= 3.0 (ADX has not shifted materially)
C2-03.rejection_reason: ADX regime changed materially (>3 points) since signal generation

C2-05.name: Market State Object Integrity
C2-05.check: mso.ts_utc == current_bar_time (MSO was computed on this bar, not a stale snapshot)
C2-05.rejection_reason: MSO timestamp does not match current bar — stale state detected

C2-06.name: Price Reasonableness
C2-06.check: abs(entry_price - close) / close < 0.005 (entry within 0.5% of current close)
C2-06.rejection_reason: Entry price deviates more than 0.5% from current close — possible data error

C3_ari_state.description: Re-verify all ARI rules at the moment of transmission (final ARI check)
C3_ari_state.note: These checks duplicate ARI rules intentionally. The TVL performs an independent re-verification.

C3-01.name: Daily Loss Limit
C3-01.rejection_reason: Daily loss limit reached between ARI approval and TVL verification

C3-02.name: Consecutive Loss Rule
C3-02.rejection_reason: Consecutive loss count changed between ARI approval and TVL verification

C3-05.name: Active Position Check
C3-05.rejection_reason: An active position exists — only one position per instrument permitted

C4_trade_parameters.description: Verify all trade parameters are mathematically valid and internally consistent

C4-01.name: Entry Price Valid
C4-01.check: entry_price > 0 AND entry_price is not na
C4-01.rejection_reason: Entry price is zero, negative, or undefined

C4-02.name: Stop Price Valid
C4-02.check: stop_price > 0 AND stop_price != entry_price AND (direction==LONG: stop_price < entry_price) AND (direction==SHORT: stop_price > entry_price)
C4-02.rejection_reason: Stop price is invalid, equal to entry, or on wrong side of entry

C4-03.name: Target Price Valid
C4-03.check: target_price > 0 AND target_price != entry_price AND (direction==LONG: target_price > entry_price) AND (direction==SHORT: target_price < entry_price)
C4-03.rejection_reason: Target price is invalid, equal to entry, or on wrong side of entry

C4-04.name: Risk Points Consistent
C4-04.check: abs(risk_pts - abs(entry_price - stop_price)) < 0.5 (within 0.5 points of calculated risk)
C4-04.rejection_reason: Risk points in payload do not match entry/stop calculation

C4-05.name: Contract Quantity Valid
C4-05.check: contracts >= 1 AND contracts <= 10 AND contracts is integer
C4-05.rejection_reason: Contract quantity is zero, fractional, or exceeds hard cap of 10

C4-06.name: Risk Dollars Consistent
C4-06.rejection_reason: Risk dollars in payload do not match contracts × risk_pts × point_value

C4-07.name: R Multiple Valid
C4-07.rejection_reason: Reward:Risk ratio below minimum threshold of 1.5

C4-08.name: Order Direction Valid
C4-08.rejection_reason: Order direction is undefined or invalid

C4-09.name: Stop Distance Minimum
C4-09.check: risk_pts >= 0.5 * atr_14 (stop is at least 50% of ATR14 — prevents stop too tight)
C4-09.rejection_reason: Stop distance is less than 50% of ATR14 — stop is too tight for current volatility

C5_duplicate_prevention.description: Verify this is not a duplicate or replayed signal

C5-01.name: Unique Signal ID
C5-01.check: signal_id not in signal_id_cache (60-second rolling cache)
C5-01.rejection_reason: Signal ID already processed within the last 60 seconds — duplicate detected

C5-02.name: Current Bar Not Already Traded
C5-02.rejection_reason: A trade was already taken on this bar — one trade per bar maximum

C5-03.name: No Pending Webhook
C5-03.rejection_reason: A webhook transmission is already in progress for this signal

C5-04.name: No Pending Order
C5-04.check: broker_pending_order == false (no unacknowledged order at broker)
C5-04.rejection_reason: An unacknowledged order exists at the broker

C5-05.name: Duplicate JSON Payload
C5-05.check: sha256(payload) not in payload_hash_cache (5-minute rolling cache)
C5-05.rejection_reason: Identical JSON payload received within the last 5 minutes

C5-06.name: Position Reconciliation
C5-06.check: pine_position_size == broker_position_size (Pine and broker agree on position state)
C5-06.rejection_reason: Pine Script position state does not match broker position — reconciliation required

C6_broker_safety.description: Verify broker connectivity and payload integrity before transmission
C6_broker_safety.note: C6 failures result in DELAYED (not REJECTED) because they are transient infrastructure issues, not logical errors. The signal remains valid; transmission is deferred.

C6-01.name: Trading Session Open
C6-01.rejection_reason: Broker reports trading session is not open

C6-02.name: Symbol Matches
C6-02.rejection_reason: Ticker symbol in payload does not match configured instrument

C6-03.name: Account Available
C6-03.rejection_reason: TradersPost account is not active or has been suspended

C6-04.name: Broker Connected
C6-04.rejection_reason: Tradovate broker connection is not active

C6-05.name: Webhook Payload Valid
C6-05.check: all required fields present AND all types correct
C6-05.rejection_reason: Webhook payload is missing required fields or has type errors

C6-06.name: JSON Schema Valid
C6-06.check: payload validates against ADE webhook_payload_schema v1.0
C6-06.rejection_reason: JSON payload does not conform to the registered schema
